3.1 Grid usage: October 2023 - October 2024
According to the EGI accounting portal, in
2024,  the VO Auger ran about 855 thousand
single-core jobs on 10 grid sites from 7 coun-
tries, totaling 178 million CPU hours, normal-
ized to HEP-Score23 (HS23) [27]. Excluding
theVOLHCb fromthe list ofAstrophysicsVOs,
the VOAuger appears as the second largest EGI
user with a relative usage of 17.6%, only behind
VIRGO, with 52.4%, as shown in Fig. 4. The
VO Auger is consolidating its position as one
of the largest users, having increased its HS23
